entries.source: Treat this as a stateful, evidence-aware historical simulation with a passport, travel advisory, world view, and choices.
entries.value: Hanteer dit as 'n toestandbewuste, bewysbewuste historiese simulasie met 'n paspoort, reisadvies, wêreldbeskouing en keuses.

entries.source: Treating a popular market as an attractive market.
entries.value: Om 'n gewilde mark as 'n aantreklike mark te behandel.

entries.source: Treating religion as private opinion rather than public order would sound strange and possibly dangerous.
entries.value: Om godsdiens as private opinie eerder as openbare orde te behandel, sou vreemd en moontlik gevaarlik klink.

entries.source: Treats revenue growth as value growth.
Treats style as a substitute for reasoning.
entries.value: Behandel styl as 'n plaasvervanger vir beredenering.

entries.source: Trial talk travels through civic spaces
Try first: a coffee tax raises sellers' cost. What should you expect before seeing the graph?
entries.value: Probeer eers: 'n koffiebelasting verhoog verkopers se koste. Wat moet jy verwag voordat jy die grafiek sien?

entries.source: Try first: a value logs as undefined right after a fetch call. What is the most useful first check?
entries.value: Probeer eers: 'n waarde word as ongedefinieerd aangeteken net na 'n fetch-oproep. Wat is die nuttigste eerste kontrole?

entries.source: Try first: if sales grow 20% but margins shrink and inventory needs jump, what probably happens to free cash flow?
entries.value: Probeer eers: as verkope met 20% groei, maar marges krimp en voorraadbehoeftes skiet die hoogte in, wat gebeur waarskynlik met vrye kontantvloei?

entries.source: Try first: in food delivery, which force is most likely strengthened by customers comparing prices across apps?
entries.value: Probeer eers: in voedselaflewering, watter krag word heel waarskynlik versterk deurdat klante pryse oor toepassings heen vergelyk?

entries.source: Try first: what is better evidence that you understand a new concept?
entries.value: Probeer eers: wat is beter bewys dat jy 'n nuwe konsep verstaan?

entries.source: Try first: which sentence usually needs repair when evidence is present but the paragraph still feels unconvincing?
entries.value: Probeer eers: watter sin moet gewoonlik herstel word wanneer bewyse teenwoordig is, maar die paragraaf steeds onoortuigend voel?

entries.source: Try this frame: "When ___ changes, ___ changes because ___."
entries.value: Probeer hierdie raamwerk: "Wanneer ___ verander, verander ___ omdat ___."

entries.source: Turn material into a deck you actually test yourself on.
entries.value: Verander materiaal in 'n stel kaarte waarop jy jouself werklik toets.

entries.source: Turn the weak spot into a quiz, flashcards, or a follow-up chat.
entries.value: Verander die swak punt in 'n vasvra, flitskaarte of 'n opvolggesprek.

entries.source: Understand basics, solve problems, revise fast...
entries.value: Verstaan basiese beginsels, los probleme op, hersien vinnig...

entries.source: Understand photosynthesis, write an essay plan...
Understanding means you can predict, explain, and use an idea in a new situation. Reading is only the start.
entries.value: Om te verstaan beteken dat jy 'n idee kan voorspel, verduidelik en in 'n nuwe situasie kan gebruik. Lees is net die begin.

entries.source: Unresolved until the historical setting is specified.
entries.value: Onopgelos totdat die historiese omgewing gespesifiseer is.

entries.source: Unverified details must stay visibly uncertain
entries.value: Ongeverifieerde besonderhede moet sigbaar onseker bly
Gebruik klets om dit aan te pas

entries.source: Use only as the last resort.
Use the dossier to see what incentives, fears, allies, and enemies shape the reply.
entries.value: Gebruik die dossier om te sien watter aansporings, vrese, bondgenote en vyande die antwoord vorm.

entries.source: Use visible sections: Shared artifact, AI contribution, User move, Inline comments, Decision log, Open questions, Next action.
entries.value: Gebruik sigbare afdelings: Gedeelde artefak, KI-bydrae, Gebruikersskuif, Inlyn-kommentaar, Besluitelogboek, Oop vrae, Volgende aksie.

entries.source: User's purpose: help them choose sharp opening questions.
entries.value: Gebruiker se doel: help hulle om skerp openingsvrae te kies.

entries.source: Value = forecast free cash flows discounted for risk + discounted terminal value.
entries.value: Waarde = voorspelde vrye kontantvloeie verdiskonteer vir risiko + verdiskonteerde terminale waarde.

entries.source: West Market during the Tang dynasty
Wet dust, shouted rumors, smoke, prayer calls, and the metallic anxiety of a city under pressure.
entries.value: Nat stof, uitgeroepte gerugte, rook, gebedsoproepe en die metaalagtige angs van 'n stad onder druk.

entries.source: What are we trying to build, solve, learn, or improve?
entries.value: Wat probeer ons bou, oplos, leer of verbeter?

entries.source: What do you want to ask, test, learn, or confront?
entries.value: Wat wil jy vra, toets, leer of konfronteer?

entries.source: What do you want to understand or be able to do?
entries.value: Wat wil jy verstaan of in staat wees om te doen?

entries.source: What kind of journey is this?
What they value, defend, miss, or refuse.
entries.value: Wat hulle waardeer, verdedig, mis of weier.

entries.source: What would you like to be quizzed on today?
entries.value: Waaroor wil jy vandag getoets word?

entries.source: Where and when do you want to go?
entries.value: Waar en wanneer wil jy gaan?

entries.source: Whether one encounter changes a crowd's direction
entries.value: Of een ontmoeting die rigting van 'n skare verander

entries.source: Who pressures them, supports them, or threatens them.
entries.value: Wie hulle onder druk plaas, ondersteun of dreig.

entries.source: Write a 4 sentence paragraph with a claim, evidence, explanation, and consequence.
entries.value: Skryf 'n paragraaf van 4 sinne met 'n bewering, bewys, verduideliking en gevolg.

entries.source: Write a short answer. The app checks the link, not polish.
entries.value: Skryf 'n kort antwoord. Die toepassing kontroleer die skakel, nie die afwerking nie.

entries.source: Write the core link in one sentence before moving on.
entries.value: Skryf die kernskakel in een sin voordat jy aangaan.

entries.source: Write your answer, even if it is rough.
entries.value: Skryf jou antwoord, selfs al is dit rof.

entries.source: Yes. Evidence needs interpretation or the argument feels unfinished.
entries.value: Ja. Bewyse benodig interpretasie, anders voel die argument onvoltooid.

entries.source: Yes. You connected sales, margins, and working capital instead of treating one line as the whole model.
entries.value: Ja. Jy het verkope, marges en bedryfskapitaal verbind in plaas daarvan om een lyn as die hele model te behandel.

entries.source: You add ideas first so the buddy can build with you.
entries.value: Jy voeg eerste idees by sodat die maat saam met jou kan bou.

entries.source: You can recognize the definition when it appears.
entries.value: Jy kan die definisie herken wanneer dit verskyn.

entries.source: You can use it correctly in a new example.
entries.value: Jy kan dit korrek in 'n nuwe voorbeeld gebruik.

entries.source: You gave enough of the causal link to move forward.
entries.value: Jy het genoeg van die oorsaaklike skakel verskaf om vorentoe te beweeg.

entries.source: You have a starting map now. Let us rebuild the weak spots.
entries.value: Jy het nou 'n begin-kaart. Kom ons herbou die swak plekke.

entries.source: You have evidence for this step. Use Continue to move ahead.
entries.value: Jy het bewyse vir hierdie stap. Gebruik Gaan voort om vorentoe te beweeg.

entries.source: You named a changed input and connected it to the result. That is the move we are training.
entries.value: Jy het 'n veranderde inset benoem en dit aan die resultaat gekoppel. Dit is die skuif wat ons oefen.

entries.source: You read three explanations about it.
entries.value: Jy het drie verduidelikings daaroor gelees.

entries.source: Your answer controls the next question.
entries.value: Jou antwoord beheer die volgende vraag.

entries.source: Your answer needs a clearer because-link: what changed, what it affected, and why.
entries.value: Jou antwoord benodig 'n duideliker omdat-skakel: wat het verander, wat dit beïnvloed het, en hoekom.

entries.source: Your buddy works beside you: you contribute ideas, the app organizes them, and both of you checkpoint progress.
entries.value: Jou maat werk langs jou: jy dra idees by, die toepassing organiseer dit, en julle albei kontroleer vordering.

entries.source: Your status controls language, money, access, danger, and what questions sound natural.
entries.value: Jou status beheer taal, geld, toegang, gevaar, en watter vrae natuurlik klink.

entries.source: Curious about absolutely anything? Ask, explore, and go deeper at your pace. Your buddy makes ideas practical, memorable, and easy to build on. Try: "Explain how the stock market actually works."
entries.value: Nuuskierig oor absoluut enigiets? Vra, verken, en gaan dieper teen jou eie pas. Jou maat maak idees prakties, onvergeetlik, en maklik om op voort te bou. Probeer: "Verduidelik hoe die aandelemark werklik werk."

entries.source: What are you curious about today?
Ask any question and learn through clear explanations, examples, follow-up prompts, and patient AI tutoring.
entries.value: Vra enige vraag en leer deur duidelike verduidelikings, voorbeelde, opvolg-aanwysings, en geduldige KI-onderrig.

entries.source: Curious learners, students, parents, and self-taught builders who want a friendly place to start.
entries.value: Nuuskierige leerders, studente, ouers en selfonderrig-bouers wat 'n vriendelike plek soek om te begin.

entries.source: Instead of dropping a long answer, inspir helps you choose a simpler foundation, a deeper route, or a practical example.
entries.value: In plaas daarvan om net 'n lang antwoord te gee, help inspir jou om 'n eenvoudiger fondament, 'n dieper roete of 'n praktiese voorbeeld te kies.

entries.source: Leave with a useful next question

entries.value: Help my om fotosintese te verstaan

entries.source: A guided reasoning chamber for disciplined questioning

Turn a concept, argument, problem, text, or decision into a focused chain of questions. Your buddy listens to each answer, maps assumptions and gaps, and pushes you toward your own final synthesis. Try: "Help me understand opportunity cost."
entries.value: Verander 'n konsep, argument, probleem, teks of besluit in 'n gefokusde ketting van vrae. Jou maat luister na elke antwoord, karteer aannames en leemtes, en stoot jou na jou eie finale sintese. Probeer: "Help my om geleentheidskoste te verstaan."

entries.source: Answer the active question in your own words
entries.value: Beantwoord die aktiewe vraag in jou eie woorde

entries.source: Learn through focused questions, hints, and reflection instead of passive answer reading.
entries.value: Leer deur gefokusde vrae, wenke en refleksie in plaas daarvan om passief antwoorde te lees.

entries.source: Learners who want to think through a topic, test assumptions, and build durable understanding.
entries.value: Leerders wat deur 'n onderwerp wil dink, aannames wil toets en blywende begrip wil bou.

entries.source: The tutor asks one question at a time, waits for your reasoning, and synthesizes only after you have tried.
entries.value: Die tutor vra een vraag op 'n slag, wag vir jou redenasie en sintetiseer eers nadat jy dit probeer het.

entries.source: Turn confusion into a clearer model
Should a company enter this market?
Build, critique, and learn in a shared workroom
entries.value: Bou, kritiseer en leer in 'n gedeelde werkruimte

entries.source: Open a shared workspace with an AI collaborator. Make a rough artifact, trade edits, challenge weak spots, log decisions, and leave with concrete progress.
entries.value: Maak 'n gedeelde werkspasie oop met 'n KI-medewerker. Skep 'n rowwe konsep, ruil wysigings uit, daag swak punte uit, teken besluite aan en vertrek met konkrete vordering.

entries.source: Add your next edit, decision, question, or handoff
entries.value: Voeg jou volgende wysiging, besluit, vraag of oorhandiging by

entries.source: Open a shared workspace with an AI collaborator. Make a rough artifact, trade edits, challenge weak spots, log decisions, and leave with concrete progress.
entries.value: Maak 'n gedeelde werkspasie oop met 'n KI-medewerker. Skep 'n rowwe konsep, ruil wysigings uit, daag swak punte uit, teken besluite aan en vertrek met konkrete vordering.

entries.source: Learners exploring foundations topics who want practical guidance instead of a generic answer box.
entries.value: Leerders wat grondslae-onderwerpe verken en praktiese leiding wil hê in plaas van 'n generiese antwoordblokkie.

entries.source: This mode is tuned for collaborative instruction with its own prompts, examples, and learning flow.
entries.value: Hierdie modus is ingestel vir samewerkende onderrig met sy eie aansporings, voorbeelde en leervloei.

entries.source: Build, critique, and learn in a shared workroom
entries.value: Bou, lewer kritiek en leer in 'n gedeelde werkkamer

entries.source: Adapt the session to your goal
entries.value: Pas die sessie aan by jou doelwit

entries.source: Build a photosynthesis explanation with me
entries.value: Bou 'n verduideliking van fotosintese saam met my
Help my om 'n opstel te beplan

entries.source: Adaptive lessons that make you do
entries.value: Adaptiewe lesse wat jou laat doen

entries.source: Learn by doing, seeing, comparing, repairing, and proving mastery. The app builds a live lesson canvas around your goal instead of turning instruction into a long chat. Try: "Teach me financial modeling."
entries.value: Leer deur te doen, te sien, te vergelyk, te herstel en bemeestering te bewys. Die toepassing bou 'n lewendige lesdoek rondom jou doelwit in plaas daarvan om onderrig in 'n lang klets te verander. Probeer: "Leer my finansiële modellering."

entries.source: What would you like to learn today?
Learn by doing, comparing, repairing, and proving mastery with an AI tutor that turns your goal into an active lesson.
entries.value: Leer deur te doen, te vergelyk, te herstel en bemeestering te bewys met 'n KI-tutor wat jou doelwit in 'n aktiewe les verander.

entries.source: Learners who want a guided lesson canvas with examples, checks, and active practice instead of a long chat answer.
entries.value: Leerders wat 'n begeleide lesdoek wil hê met voorbeelde, kontroles en aktiewe oefening in plaas van 'n lang kletsantwoord.

entries.source: The mode keeps the session interactive, moving between explanation, try-it steps, checks, and repairs.
entries.value: Die modus hou die sessie interaktief en beweeg tussen verduideliking, probeer-dit-stappe, kontroles en herstelwerk.

entries.source: Help me learn supply and demand
entries.value: Help my om vraag en aanbod te leer
Leer my Porter se Vyf Kragte

entries.source: 10 MCQs on any topic with a score
entries.value: 10 meervoudigekeusevrae oor enige onderwerp met 'n telling

entries.source: Pick any topic and face a focused 10-question multiple-choice quiz. You answer one question at a time, get instant feedback, and finish with a score and review.
entries.value: Kies enige onderwerp en voltooi 'n gefokusde meervoudigekeusevasvra van 10 vrae. Jy beantwoord een vraag op 'n slag, kry onmiddellike terugvoer, en eindig met 'n telling en oorsig.

entries.source: What topic shall we put you to the test on?
entries.value: Oor watter onderwerp moet ons jou toets?

entries.source: Generate a focused multiple-choice quiz on any subject and review explanations after each answer.
entries.value: Genereer 'n gefokusde meervoudigekeusevasvra oor enige onderwerp en hersien verduidelikings na elke antwoord.

entries.source: Learners who want active recall, quick practice, and a score they can improve.
entries.value: Leerders wat aktiewe herroeping, vinnige oefening en 'n telling wat hulle kan verbeter, wil hê.

entries.source: The quiz mode hides answers until you respond, then turns every miss into a review point.
entries.value: Die vasvramodus versteek antwoorde totdat jy reageer, en verander dan elke fout in 'n hersieningspunt.

entries.source: Receive a temporal passport, clear a travel advisory, then explore a specific historical society through scene, map, timeline, people, rules, inventory, and evidence.
entries.value: Ontvang 'n tydelike paspoort, maak 'n reisadvies skoon, en verken dan 'n spesifieke historiese samelewing deur tonele, kaarte, tydlyne, mense, reëls, voorraad en bewyse.

entries.source: What do you do next in this world?
entries.value: Wat doen jy volgende in hierdie wêreld?

entries.source: Build a temporal passport, clear the travel advisory, and explore a historical world through scene, map, timeline, people, rules, inventory, and evidence.
entries.value: Bou 'n tydelike paspoort, maak die reisadvies skoon, en verken 'n historiese wêreld deur tonele, kaarte, tydlyne, mense, reëls, voorraad en bewyse.

entries.source: History learners who want a specific society, identity, and set of constraints rather than a generic period summary.
entries.value: Geskiedenisleerders wat 'n spesifieke samelewing, identiteit en stel beperkings wil hê in plaas van 'n generiese tydperkopsumming.

entries.source: The journey stays anchored in state and evidence: what is known, what is reconstructed, what is speculative, and what your identity can realistically access.
entries.value: Die reis bly geanker in toestand en bewyse: wat bekend is, wat gerekonstrueer is, wat spekulatief is, en waartoe jou identiteit realisties toegang het.

entries.source: Step into conversation with a historical figure. Ask questions, challenge ideas, and hear the world through their era, values, and limits.
entries.value: Tree in gesprek met 'n historiese figuur. Vra vrae, daag idees uit en ervaar die wêreld deur hul era, waardes en beperkings.

entries.source: Which historical figure would you like to meet?
entries.value: Watter historiese figuur wil jy ontmoet?

entries.source: Ask questions, challenge ideas, and learn history through grounded conversations with public figures from the past.
entries.value: Vra vrae, daag idees uit en leer geskiedenis deur gegronde gesprekke met openbare figure uit die verlede.

entries.source: Learners who want to understand people, choices, and ideas in historical context.
entries.value: Leerders wat mense, keuses en idees in 'n historiese konteks wil verstaan.

entries.source: The app separates in-character conversation from short context notes about records and uncertainty.
entries.value: Die toepassing skei gesprekke in karakter van kort konteksnotas oor rekords en onsekerheid.

entries.source: Name a real or fictional personality and debate them on any topic. The AI channels their public style and worldview while keeping the debate fair.
entries.value: Noem 'n werklike of fiktiewe persoonlikheid en debatteer met hulle oor enige onderwerp. Die KI kanaliseer hul openbare styl en wêreldbeskouing terwyl die debat regverdig gehou word.

entries.source: Who do you want to debate, and on what?
entries.value: Met wie wil jy debatteer, en waaroor?

entries.source: Practice argument by debating a public or fictional personality on a topic you choose.
entries.value: Oefen argumentering deur met 'n openbare of fiktiewe persoonlikheid te debatteer oor 'n onderwerp van jou keuse.

entries.source: Learners who want lively debate practice with memorable voices and fair challenge.
entries.value: Leerders wat lewendige debatsoefening met onvergeetlike stemme en regverdige uitdagings wil hê.

entries.source: The debate uses public style and worldview without pretending to know private beliefs.
entries.value: Die debat gebruik openbare styl en wêreldbeskouing sonder om voor te gee dat dit private oortuigings ken.

entries.source: Debate climate policy with Greta Thunberg
Argue both sides and sharpen thinking
entries.value: Argumenteer beide kante en slyp jou denke

entries.source: Pick any topic and go head-to-head in a real debate. Choose a side, get challenged, and learn to make better arguments.
entries.value: Kies enige onderwerp en gaan kop-aan-kop in 'n werklike debat. Kies 'n kant, word uitgedaag, en leer om beter argumente te maak.

entries.source: Debate any topic, get challenged, compare claims, and learn how to make stronger arguments.
entries.value: Debatteer enige onderwerp, word uitgedaag, vergelyk bewerings, en leer hoe om sterker argumente te maak.

entries.source: Students, debaters, writers, and curious learners who want stronger reasoning.
entries.value: Studente, debatteerders, skrywers en nuuskierige leerders wat sterker redenasievermoë wil hê.

entries.source: The coach pushes one strong counterargument at a time and tracks the claims that matter.
entries.value: Die afrigter bied een sterk teenargument op 'n slag en volg die bewerings wat saak maak.
